german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not a Barrier
german_requirement.subtitle: Most roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility despite some unclassified positions.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-facing PMs, indicating a concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Are Predominant in Workforce
seniority.subtitle: With 41% of positions held by mid-level professionals, seniority is balanced but leans towards mid-level.

work_mode.title: Work Modes Reflect Diverse Employee Preferences
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of the workforce favors hybrid and onsite arrangements over fully remote options.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: Nearly half of roles now prioritize AI responsibilities or require AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
